feature: Redesign daily calorie summary: replace KPI tiles with single-line actual/target display

prompts.description: Remove right-side header number and replace both KPI tiles with a single calorie summary line + diff badge
prompts.prompt:
In components/daily-view.tsx, make exactly these two changes inside the 'Today at a glance' Card and nothing else: **Change 1 — CardHeader**: The CardTitle row is currently wrapped in `
` with a right-side element showing the large calorie number. Unwrap the CardTitle and remove the right-side element so the header just has the title directly. **Change 2 — CardContent**: Replace the `
` block (both dashboard-kpi-tile divs) with a single-line flex row: ```tsx
{currentDay.totalCalories} / {userProfile.dailyCalories} kcal {calorieDifference !== 0 && ( {calorieDifference < 0 ? `+${Math.abs(Math.round(calorieDifference))} kcal` : `-${Math.round(calorieDifference)} kcal`} )}
``` Do not touch the bridge-note-strip, progress bar, MacroProgress rows, or any other part of the file.
